summary: R51a1 checker-predicate design seed; product checker NOT_RUN.
normalization: normalize aliases, ownership regions, rows, labels, and witness identities before decision
decision_procedure: validate the declared descriptor shape as design documentation only
record WherePredicateAdmitted requires and candidate diagnostic vocabulary without executing a checker decision
emit no diagnostic and create no product execution receipt while predicate_maturity is design_seed
promote only after a closed terminating algorithm plus discriminating positive/negative fixtures is independently reviewed
termination_metric: finite descriptor size plus strictly decreasing dependency DAG rank
evaluation_order: preconditions -> normalization -> dependencies -> local rule -> diagnostic

summary: R51a1 checker-predicate design seed; product checker NOT_RUN.
normalization: normalize aliases, ownership regions, rows, labels, and witness identities before decision
decision_procedure: validate the declared descriptor shape as design documentation only
record WhereRelationTaxonomyAdmitted requires and candidate diagnostic vocabulary without executing a checker decision
emit no diagnostic and create no product execution receipt while predicate_maturity is design_seed

summary: ordered branch 1: a missing witness_id, implementation_id, coherence_key, or empty candidate_implementation_ids emits WITNESS_COHERENCE_EVIDENCE_MISSING; ordered branch 2: coherence_key unequal to witness_id, or candidate_implementation_ids has exactly one element and that sole candidate is unequal to implementation_id, emits WITNESS_IMPLEMENTATION_SELECTION_MISMATCH; ordered branch 3: more than one candidate implementation emits WITNESS_DUPLICATE_IN_COHERENCE_DOMAIN; ordered branch 4: orphan_rule_admitted is false or declaring_package equals neither type_owner nor trait_owner emits WITNESS_ORPHAN_RULE_VIOLATION; only after all four branches pass is the witness/implementation pair coherent
requires: ordered branch 1: a missing witness_id, implementation_id, coherence_key, or empty candidate_implementation_ids emits WITNESS_COHERENCE_EVIDENCE_MISSING

ordered branch 2: coherence_key unequal to witness_id, or candidate_implementation_ids has exactly one element and that sole candidate is unequal to implementation_id, emits WITNESS_IMPLEMENTATION_SELECTION_MISMATCH
ordered branch 3: more than one candidate implementation emits WITNESS_DUPLICATE_IN_COHERENCE_DOMAIN
ordered branch 4: orphan_rule_admitted is false or declaring_package equals neither type_owner nor trait_owner emits WITNESS_ORPHAN_RULE_VIOLATION
only after all four branches pass is the witness/implementation pair coherent
preconditions: ordered branch 1: a missing witness_id, implementation_id, coherence_key, or empty candidate_implementation_ids emits WITNESS_COHERENCE_EVIDENCE_MISSING

ordered branch 2: coherence_key unequal to witness_id, or candidate_implementation_ids has exactly one element and that sole candidate is unequal to implementation_id, emits WITNESS_IMPLEMENTATION_SELECTION_MISMATCH
ordered branch 3: more than one candidate implementation emits WITNESS_DUPLICATE_IN_COHERENCE_DOMAIN
ordered branch 4: orphan_rule_admitted is false or declaring_package equals neither type_owner nor trait_owner emits WITNESS_ORPHAN_RULE_VIOLATION
only after all four branches pass is the witness/implementation pair coherent
normalization: normalize aliases, ownership regions, rows, labels, and witness identities before decision
decision_procedure: validate the closed RCTS-V5 descriptor
evaluate dependency predicates left-to-right and propagate the dependency's selected diagnostic unchanged
evaluate WitnessCoherent diagnostic_dispatch conditions once in their declared deterministic order
emit only the diagnostic selected by the first matching condition (or its declared advisory lint), never the entire secondary_diagnostics list; otherwise return success
termination_metric: finite descriptor size plus strictly decreasing dependency DAG rank
evaluation_order: preconditions -> normalization -> dependencies -> local rule -> diagnostic

summary: resolve conformance obligations deterministically without structural or extension auto-witness
requires: resolve conformance obligations deterministically without structural or extension auto-witness
preconditions: resolve conformance obligations deterministically without structural or extension auto-witness
normalization: normalize aliases, ownership regions, rows, labels, and witness identities before decision
decision_procedure: validate the closed RCTSDescriptorV5 and its native conditional constraints
evaluate declared dependency predicates left-to-right and propagate their selected diagnostic
enumerate visible nominal conformance candidates by canonical coherence key
exclude extension, structural, local runtime, and named nonautomatic candidates
filter orphan/visibility/conditional obligations
zero emits TRAIT_MISSING_WITNESS; more than one emits TRAIT_AMBIGUOUS_IMPORTED_WITNESS; one returns sealed evidence
emit only the first diagnostic selected by the declared deterministic order; otherwise admit
termination_metric: finite normalized descriptor plus a strictly decreasing dependency/obligation DAG with a visited-key set
evaluation_order: schema -> normalization -> dependencies -> ordered local branches -> one primary diagnostic

summary: witness method responsibility must not be wider than requirement
requires: witness method responsibility must not be wider than requirement
preconditions: witness method responsibility must not be wider than requirement
normalization: normalize aliases, ownership regions, rows, labels, and witness identities before decision
decision_procedure: validate the closed RCTSDescriptorV5 and its native conditional constraints
evaluate declared dependency predicates left-to-right and propagate their selected diagnostic
normalize requirement and implementation receiver/ownership/error/effect/authority/isolation rows
reject every widening beyond the requirement in fixed ownership,error,effect,authority,isolation order
return the exact compatible evidence signature
emit only the first diagnostic selected by the declared deterministic order; otherwise admit
termination_metric: finite normalized descriptor plus a strictly decreasing dependency/obligation DAG with a visited-key set
evaluation_order: schema -> normalization -> dependencies -> ordered local branches -> one primary diagnostic
